description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a rounded, bulging midsection and flat, circular top and bottom surfaces. The body is constructed from vertical wooden staves, tightly bound by four metallic hoops—two near the top and two near the bottom. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a robust and aged appearance. The metallic hoops are smooth and silvery, providing structural reinforcement and a visual contrast to the wood. The top surface is closed and flush with the rim, and there are no visible handles or openings. This type of barrel is commonly found in urban environments for storage, decoration, or waste collection.
description: A dark wooden barrel with metallic hoops, rounded sides, and a closed flat top, featuring a robust, aged appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's bulging midsection, dark wood grain, and two metallic hoops near the top and bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth curvature of the barrel and the even spacing of the metallic hoops.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the wood texture and metallic bands clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the same rounded profile and banding, with subtle wood grain details.
